description_long: This is a modern rectangular bathroom sink with a white ceramic basin mounted atop a wooden vanity cabinet. The basin features a single faucet and a central drain, with smooth, rounded edges and a glossy finish. The vanity cabinet below is constructed from wood with a horizontal grain pattern and includes a wide, dark-colored handle on a pull-out drawer. The sides and rear of the cabinet are plain, with the wood texture continuing seamlessly around the unit. The faucet is metallic and has a single lever for water control, positioned at the rear of the basin. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for urban bathrooms or public washrooms.
description: A modern white ceramic sink with a wood-grain vanity cabinet and a single metallic faucet, featuring a wide pull-out drawer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white basin, central faucet, and the wood cabinet with a wide horizontal handle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the basin and the partially open drawer beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wood back and the faucet silhouette above the basin.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the basin profile and the partially open drawer from the opposite side.
